---
name: Domain Profile Proposal
about: Propose a new vertical-specific domain profile
labels: domain-profile
---

## Vertical

Which industry or service type? (e.g., groceries, pharmacy, home services)

## Use cases

What transactions should agents be able to perform in this vertical?

## Proposed schema additions

What types, fields, or status mappings are needed beyond the core ASP schemas?

## Example flow

Walk through a typical transaction in this vertical using ASP capabilities.

## References

Links to existing standards, APIs, or documentation for this vertical.
